para_trans: On reconstitution of Mahatma Jotirao Phule Charitra Sadhana Prakashan Samiti.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Higher and Technical Education
Government Decision No: Narrow-2026 / Q.64 / E-1297346 / MASHI-2
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: March 97, 2026

Reference: - 1) Government Decisions Department of Education and Employment, No. Majofu / 1090 / (5841) Culture-1, d. 28.12.1990 2) Government Decision Department of Higher and Technical Education No. 08.07.2025
The Proposal: -
Reference No. 1 Mahatma Jotirao Phule Charitra Sadhana Prakashan Samiti set up by a government decision here
has been done. Reference No. 2 From the date of expiry of the term of this Committee by decision of the Government hereunder.
To extend the term of office for a period of three months or for such period as may be earlier, whichever is earlier, during which the Committee shall be reconstituted.
It had come. Accordingly, the matter of reconstituting the committee was under consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Mahatma Jotirao Phule Charitra Sadhana Prakashan Samiti reconstituted as shown in the following statement:
It is being approved by the government.
WSO 0 Member Secretary
